opportunities.title: OutBound Conference 2026 (Main Event + Leadership Summit)
opportunities.organization: OutBound Conference, Inc. (founded by Jeb Blount)
opportunities.date: November 10-12, 2026 (Main Event Nov 10-11, Leadership Summit Nov 12)
opportunities.deadline: Not specified - inquire directly via website
opportunities.fit_reason: The world's largest sales training and leadership conference draws top sales trainers and leaders, making it a strong stage to present trust-based selling frameworks to individual contributors and sales leaders alike.

opportunities.title: NSN Professional Conference and Career Fair 2026
opportunities.deadline: Not specified - contact NSN for speaker consideration
opportunities.fit_reason: NSN's flagship conference gathers 2,600+ sales professionals and welcomes thought leaders and changemakers, a natural fit for a trust-based sales culture keynote.

opportunities.title: Dreamforce 2026
opportunities.deadline: Not specified - inquire about Trailblazer/partner speaking tracks
opportunities.fit_reason: Dreamforce's massive sales, CX and GTM tracks and breakout sessions offer visibility for a trust-based sales leadership message in front of a huge B2B sales audience.

opportunities.title: UNBOUND (formerly INBOUND) 2026
opportunities.deadline: Not specified - speaker applications typically open several months prior
opportunities.fit_reason: UNBOUND brings together marketing, sales, and customer experience leaders and is known to accept speaker applications, aligning well with sessions on trust-based B2B sales culture.

opportunities.title: Sales Enablement Summit - Washington
opportunities.deadline: Not specified - contact organizers regarding speaking opportunities
opportunities.fit_reason: This enablement-focused summit covers rep performance, coaching, and GTM alignment, all of which connect directly to building a trust-based B2B sales culture.

opportunities.title: Sales Enablement Summit - Austin
opportunities.deadline: Not specified - contact organizers regarding speaking opportunities
opportunities.fit_reason: Part of the Sales Enablement Collective's US circuit focused on rep productivity and revenue impact, a good venue for trust-based sales leadership content.

opportunities.title: Sales Enablement Summit - New York
opportunities.deadline: Not specified - contact organizers regarding speaking opportunities
opportunities.fit_reason: A senior-management-heavy audience (80%+ per organizer data) makes this a strong venue for a trust-based sales culture keynote.

opportunities.title: Professionals in Paradise (PIP) 2026
opportunities.date: July 30 - August 2, 2026, Orlando, FL (Gaylord Palms Resort)
opportunities.fit_reason: This business/leadership retreat is actively seeking speakers and panelists on business and leadership topics, well-suited to a trust-based sales and leadership talk.

opportunities.title: 2026 Sales Leaders Conference (Farm Credit)
opportunities.deadline: Standard rate registration by Sept 19, 2026; final rate by Oct 13, 2026
opportunities.fit_reason: This joint sales-and-marketing leadership program explicitly emphasizes that trust and relationships are the foundation of every great sale, making it highly aligned with trust-based selling content.

opportunities.title: WBENC Speaking Opportunities (Rolling Call for Speakers)
opportunities.fit_reason: WBENC accepts speaker proposals on a rolling basis for educational programming aimed at women business owners, a good fit for trust-based selling and sales culture topics for women-led B2B firms.

opportunities.title: MDRT Center for Field Leadership Call for Speakers
opportunities.date: Ongoing - MDRT Global Conference and webcasts throughout 2026
opportunities.deadline: Rolling submissions (2026 Annual Meeting CFP closed; other programs open)
opportunities.fit_reason: MDRT's Center for Field Leadership specifically seeks speakers on growing sales, team culture, and agency leadership - core trust-based sales leadership territory - for its Global Conference and webcasts.

opportunities.title: ANA Digital & Social Media Conference 2026
opportunities.deadline: Rolling - submit session description via email to speakersub@ana.net
opportunities.fit_reason: ANA accepts rolling speaker submissions from consultants (ideally co-presenting with a client-side marketer), offering a channel to pitch trust-driven B2B sales-and-marketing alignment content.

opportunities.title: Women in Sales Community Retreat 2026
opportunities.deadline: Speaker selection for this cycle appears closed (only ~20% of applicants accepted); monitor for next application window
opportunities.fit_reason: An intimate retreat for women in sales and GTM roles focused on educational content and community-building, a strong long-term target for trust-based selling talks even if this year's speaker slate is filled.

opportunities.title: Sales Gravy Podcast
opportunities.fit_reason: A top sales podcast covering sales psychology and objection handling, well matched to a trust-based selling coach's expertise on modern B2B relationship-driven selling.

opportunities.title: The Advanced Selling Podcast
opportunities.fit_reason: This long-running, practical sales training podcast regularly features guest sales experts discussing modern B2B sales challenges, a good fit for trust-based selling insights.

opportunities.title: Sales Strategy & Enablement by Revenue.io
opportunities.fit_reason: With 1,100+ episodes and a focus on sales psychology, engagement strategies, and top CROs/CSOs as guests, this show is a strong platform for trust-based sales leadership perspectives.

opportunities.title: Conversations with Women in Sales
opportunities.fit_reason: This podcast features women in sales sharing practical advice on leadership, career management, and B2B sales strategy, fitting well with trust-based sales culture themes.

opportunities.title: Selling Trust Podcast
opportunities.fit_reason: This podcast is explicitly built around relationship-based, trust-driven selling for reps who want to build real relationships without cold calling, directly matching a trust-based sales coach's core message.

opportunities.title: Changing the Sales Game Podcast
opportunities.fit_reason: Described as a podcast for sales professionals who want to build trust-driven relationships and deliver real value to clients, making it a near-perfect thematic match for a trust-based selling coach.
